nasb.text: Baldness has come upon Gaza; Ashkelon has been ruined. O remnant of their valley, How long will you gash yourself?

esv.text: Baldness has come upon Gaza; Ashkelon has perished. O remnant of their valley, how long will you gash yourselves?

cnv.text: 迦薩成了禿頭的， 亞實基倫靜默無聲， 在它們的平原上餘剩的人哪， 你們劃傷自己的身體要到幾時呢？”

ccb.text: 迦萨一片荒凉， 亚实基伦沦为废墟。 谷中的余民啊！ 你们要割伤身体到何时呢？
